job_title: AI/ML Silicon Verification Solutions Engineer – Hardware
job_description:
• Communication: Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
• This enables us to remember your preferences (for example, your choice of language or region) or when you register on areas of the Sites, such as our web programs or extranets.
• Education: BS or MS in Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, Computer Engineering, or a related field.
• Programming: Proficiency in Python, C/C++, or Object-Oriented Perl.
• Core Concepts: Strong grasp of Object-Oriented Programming (OOP), databases, and web frameworks.
• Hardware Knowledge: Familiarity with hardware description and verification languages such as SystemVerilog, UVM, and Assertions.
• Cloud Platforms: Knowledge of deploying tools in AWS, GCP, Azure, or OCI.
• DevOps: Understanding of CI/CD workflows using Jenkins or GitHub Actions.

• In this role, you will play a key part in defining software requirements, designing embedded solutions, and verifying system performance, ensuring our maintenance systems meet the evolving needs of modern aircraft.
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams to meet software engineering requirements.
• You’ll bridge engineering and IT to ensure complex aerospace development ecosystems perform at scale, meet rigorous standards, and align with regulatory and export‑controlled requirements.
• This position is ideal for engineers experienced in modern software development methodologies, debugging, and performance optimization, who thrive in highly technical, cross‑functional environments.
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams to meet software engineering requirements.
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams to meet software engineering requirements.
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams to meet software engineering requirements.
• Sr Advanced Software Engineer - (DevOps, SRE & AI) Locations Atlanta, GA, United States (Hybrid) Posting Date03/09/2026 We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Senior Site Reliability Engineer (SRE) to join our team.
